please explain the project done by this candidate.

The candidate's project, Transport Management System (TMS), is a role-based web application developed from scratch for Admins, Bookers, and Drivers. It features an Admin Panel for managing bookings, vehicles, drivers, and trip assignments. The booking module includes dynamic vehicle and driver availability checks. The system utilizes authentication with JWT, protected routes, and centralized state handling. Additionally, it provides real-time status updates, dashboard analytics, and error handling. The project stack includes React, Node.js, Express, Prisma, MySQL, and MUI.
